home.headline: Elevate Your Business with Modern Tech.
home.body: Mike Cebulski provides hands-on technical services across web systems, automation, AV, and hardware integration for businesses throughout Northern Michigan.
backgroundBody: Based in Charlevoix the beautiful, I turn overwhelming tech issues into simple solutions. My focus is user experience first so the user doesn't even notice the complexity underneath. Over the years I have developed trust in our community from local non-profits to courts across Michigan. On top of tech integrations I am also a certified counselor at BASES here in Charlevoix. I have discovered a passion for helping others and improving work efficiency. My mission is to provide businesses with the technical backbone they need to scale without friction.
Whether I'm architecting a custom web experience or designing an automated hybrid meeting room, the focus stays the same: reliability, performance, and future-proof design.

servicesIntro.title: Clear systems. Local support.
servicesIntro.body: I help local businesses navigate the digital landscape with automation, modern and captivating websites, and seamless hybrid meeting solutions.

services.headline: AI & automation consulting
services.title: Automation that respects how your team actually works.
services.description: Operational consulting for teams that need a practical path from manual work to repeatable systems.

services.headline: Business websites
services.title: A sharper digital presence to stand out from the rest.
services.description: Websites built around business-specific logic, reliable integrations, and polished delivery.

services.headline: Hybrid meeting solutions
services.title: Boardrooms and studios built for calm, confident collaboration.
services.description: Hybrid meeting environments that help in-room and remote participants feel equally present and heard.

servicePrinciples.title: Practical by default
servicePrinciples.body: Work is scoped around real operational constraints, not trendy tooling checklists.

servicePrinciples.title: One system, not silos
servicePrinciples.body: The design, copy, and implementation all reinforce the same business story.

servicePrinciples.title: Built for longevity
servicePrinciples.body: Every deliverable is meant to keep working after launch, not collapse into maintenance debt.

about.body: I build the systems around the work, websites that communicate clearly, spaces that support collaboration, and automation that makes the day-to-day feel less wasteful.

aboutHighlights.title: Technical range
aboutHighlights.body: My work brings together elegant design, thoughtful user experience, software development, and hardware management.

aboutHighlights.title: Local perspective
aboutHighlights.body: I want to bring modern technical expertise to Northern Michigan in a way that still feels personal, grounded, and local.

aboutHighlights.title: Long-term thinking
aboutHighlights.body: Projects are designed to feel polished on day one and manageable six months later.

processSteps.title: Discover
processSteps.body: We map the business problem, the friction points, and the desired outcome before touching implementation.

processSteps.title: Design
processSteps.body: Information architecture, content direction, and interface hierarchy are shaped around clarity and trust.

processSteps.title: Build
processSteps.body: Delivery stays lightweight and modern, with systems that can be maintained without ceremony.

processSteps.title: Refine
processSteps.body: The final pass focuses on polish, guidance, and the small details that make the result feel dependable.

contactPage.title: Let's build the right solution for your business.
contactPage.formBody: Share enough context to outline the goal, the timeline, and the friction you want to solve.

blogPage.title: Latest insights and technical deep dives.
blogPage.body: A few notes on modern websites, calmer systems, and how to make new technology feel less chaotic inside real businesses.
blogPage.newsletterTitle: Keep up with new notes and process writeups.
blogPage.newsletterBody: A lightweight field for now, styled from the design system and ready for a real newsletter integration later.

caseStudies.navDescription: AV planning, Zoom Rooms, and practical room integration.
caseStudies.title: Bridging the gap between ambition and infrastructure.
caseStudies.intro: A hybrid meeting environment designed to feel executive-ready, quietly reliable, and easy for teams to operate without technical supervision.
caseStudies.challenge: A leadership team needed their main boardroom to support executive meetings, remote collaboration, and client presentations without the usual cable chaos and inconsistent audio.
caseStudies.solution: The solution centered on a Zoom Rooms-first experience with clearer device roles, stronger presentation flow, and room planning that balanced aesthetics with operational simplicity.
caseStudies.role: Strategy, room planning, hardware guidance, integration direction
caseStudies.ctaBody: If your meeting rooms need to feel more dependable, we can design the workflow before the next hardware purchase becomes expensive guesswork.

summary.title: Context
summary.body: The room needed to support leadership, clients, and hybrid attendees without technical babysitting.

summary.title: Approach
summary.body: The system was designed around clarity: where people look, how they speak, and how quickly a meeting can start.

summary.title: Impact
summary.body: The final setup felt composed and repeatable, with fewer awkward transitions between in-person and remote collaboration.

results: Reduced setup friction at the start of meetings.
Improved audio and presentation consistency for remote participants.
Delivered a room that matched the professional standard of the organization using it.

gallery.title: Created hybrid hub
gallery.body: A clean presentation wall and camera-ready room layout created a more professional experience for internal and client-facing calls.

gallery.title: Simple control flow
gallery.body: Control logic and equipment placement were organized around how the room is used, not just how the products are marketed.

gallery.title: Operational clarity
gallery.body: Supporting documentation reduced support calls and made everyday room operation easier for non-technical staff.

caseStudies.navDescription: Strategy, design, and maintainable site systems.
caseStudies.title: A website system that earns trust faster.
caseStudies.intro: A website redesign focused on stronger messaging, calmer structure, and implementation choices that stay easy to maintain.
caseStudies.challenge: The client needed a website that communicated authority, loaded quickly, and gave them a structure they could keep fresh without a redesign every quarter.
caseStudies.solution: The solution paired a tighter content structure with performance-minded implementation so the site felt more premium without becoming harder to update.
caseStudies.role: Strategy, UX direction, interface design, implementation
caseStudies.ctaBody: If your website is underselling the quality of your work, we can reshape the story, structure, and execution into something that earns trust faster.

summary.title: Context
summary.body: The site needed to signal quality quickly while still being manageable for ongoing updates.

summary.title: Approach
summary.body: The messaging, visual hierarchy, and implementation choices were aligned into one calmer system.

summary.title: Impact
summary.body: The finished site improved trust, sharpened the story, and removed maintenance friction.

results: Turned scattered messaging into a clearer decision path.
Improved perceived quality through stronger hierarchy and implementation polish.
Delivered a structure that remains easy to update as the business evolves.

gallery.title: Sharper narrative
gallery.body: A stronger visual hierarchy turned scattered messaging into a page flow that guided visitors from context to action.

gallery.title: Premium, not bloated
gallery.body: Performance-minded implementation kept the experience feeling premium without bloated frontend decisions.

gallery.title: Built to evolve
gallery.body: The final system balanced presentation quality with a content structure that could stay useful over time.

cta.title: Ready to solve your next challenge?
cta.body: Let's discuss how customized technical solutions can streamline your operations and drive growth.
